name: Klevu AI-Powered Commerce Search API
what_it_does: AI-powered e-commerce search and product discovery platform with REST API — enabling Shopify, Magento/Adobe Commerce, and BigCommerce merchants to implement intelligent search with natural language understanding, autocomplete, product recommendations, and smart category merchandising, with a self-learning algorithm that improves from user behavior.
use_cases: Implementing AI product search via Klevu API for Shopify/Magento e-commerce storefront
Building personalized product recommendations via Klevu for cart and post-purchase pages
Adding smart autocomplete via Klevu for type-ahead search with category and product suggestions
Implementing smart category pages via Klevu for AI-sorted product listing pages
Tracking search analytics via Klevu API for search performance and conversion optimization
not_for: Non-retail search use cases (Klevu is exclusively e-commerce product search)
Enterprise-scale deployments with very complex custom requirements (Coveo or Bloomreach for enterprise)
Development without a supported e-commerce platform (Klevu integrates with specific platforms)
best_when: A Shopify, Magento, or BigCommerce merchant needs AI-powered search and recommendations that self-learn from customer behavior — where Klevu provides a managed search solution with easy platform integration and behavioral personalization.
avoid_when: You're not on Shopify/Magento/BigCommerce, need general-purpose search, or require deep enterprise customization.

auth.notes: API key (JS API key for front-end search, REST API key for management). Search API: js-api-key query parameter or header. Management/feed API: separate REST API key. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Keys from Klevu Merchant Center. JavaScript search library for storefront. Platform plugins for Shopify/Magento/BigCommerce.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; free trial available
pricing.notes: Finnish company (Helsinki). Founded 2013 by Nilay Oza and Niraj Agarwal. Raised $3.5M (bootstrapped-ish — lean funding). MACH Alliance member. 3,000+ merchant customers. Strong in Shopify Plus, Adobe Commerce (Magento 2), BigCommerce. Self-learning search algorithm (not just keyword matching). Smart Category Merchandising — AI sorting for category pages (unique feature). Quick Search (autocomplete). Personalised Search (logged-in user history). Used by: DFS (UK furniture), Lacoste, Laura Ashley. Native Shopify App and Magento 2 module. Headless/API-first option for custom storefronts. E-commerce focus: no generic search use cases.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise agreement defines limits; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with API key. JS library for search UI. GDPR compliant. Finnish company (EU). Annual contract. Platform-specific integrations (Shopify/Magento/BigCommerce). Self-learning algorithm requires behavioral data — not useful without real traffic.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search queries fully idempotent. Catalog feed updates: product ID is key for deduplication. Analytics events are append-only.
known_agent_gotchas: Two API keys: JS API key (front-end search) vs REST API key (management) — different from most APIs
Self-learning algorithm requires real user behavioral data — search quality improves over time
Platform-specific plugins (Shopify/Magento) handle catalog sync — raw API for headless deployments
Finnish company — GDPR compliant by default, EU data residency
Annual contract required — no self-service production access
Smart Category feature requires category page integration separate from search integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Finnish company (Helsinki) — EU data protection. API key auth. JS API key is public (storefront safe). REST API key server-side only. No OAuth2 scope granularity. Behavioral data (click streams) is GDPR-sensitive. Annual contract includes data processing terms.
